name: @a1/ai
description: A1 product family — shared, framework-agnostic AI provider core: OpenRouter live model menu, per-aspect model policy, local AI settings store, and the opt-in Open Notebook connector. Consumed by every A1 product via dependency injection (inject safeFetch + a data-dir resolver).

scripts.karpathy:list: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const d='evals';if(fs.existsSync(d)){for(const l of fs.readdirSync(d)){console.log(l);}}else{console.log('(no evals dir)');}"
